title: Tandem Software Engineer Internship Interview Questions & Practice
metaDescription: Ace your Tandem Software Engineer Internship interview with AI-powered practice questions and feedback. Get ready for your NYC internship.
content:
# Tandem Software Engineer Internship Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Tandem Software Engineer Internship internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** NYC
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Tandem
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Tandem is offering a Software Engineer Internship internship position in NYC. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Tandem's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Tandem interview and increase your chances of success.
